title: MD
biography: Walter Cannon was an American physiologist who coined the term 'fight or flight response' and the concept of 'homeostasis.' He also pioneered the use of X-rays for studying the gastrointestinal tract.
aiSummary: Walter Cannon is a physiology specialist at Harvard Medical School. Based in Boston.

timeline.title: Described fight-or-flight response
timeline.description: Published Bodily Changes in Pain, Hunger, Fear and Rage, describing the sympathetic stress response

timeline.title: Coined 'homeostasis'
timeline.description: Published The Wisdom of the Body, introducing the concept of physiological homeostasis
